positive: An intricate, highly detailed symmetrical arrangement of celestial fauna and mystical flora, designed as a central, isolated graphic print. Subjects include glowing bioluminescent moths, stylized crescent moons, geometric lavender vines, and crystalline butterflies, floating within a deep navy and cosmic sapphire palette. The style should be a harmonious blend of Art Deco engraving and ethereal watercolor, featuring clean, thick black outlines on a slightly distressed parchment background. Emphasize strong contrast, defined silhouettes, and radial symmetry, ensuring the composition is balanced and suitable for apparel printing. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, print-ready vector aesthetic.
negative: lowres, worst quality, blurry, grainy, pixelated, watermark, signature, text, logo, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distortion, artifacts, messy, clutter, noise
